description: Stock analysis dashboard — technical indicators, fundamental scores, and market data from yfinance → InfluxDB

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "current_price")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "market_cap")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "pe_ratio")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "iv")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "week_52_high")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "week_52_low")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "piotroski_score")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ticker: r.ticker, _value: r._value}))
  |> group()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "fscore")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ticker: r.ticker, _value: r._value}))
  |> group()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "current_price")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r.bollinger_signal, ticker: r.ticker}))
  |> group()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "current_price")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r.industry}))
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "current_price" or r["_field"] == "ma_50" or r["_field"] == "ma_100" or r["_field"] == "ma_150" or r["_field"] == "ma_200")

panels.description: Uses the Price History Range dropdown instead of the dashboard time picker

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: -${price_range})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "price_history")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "close")

panels.title: Price History — ${ticker} (${price_range})

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rsi")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "macd" or r["_field"] == "macd_signal")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "macd_histogram")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "vroc")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ticker"] =~ /^${ticker:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "company_info")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "ticker", "industry"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "stock_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "current_price" or r["_field"] == "market_cap" or r["_field"] == "pe_ratio" or r["_field"] == "rsi" or r["_field"] == "piotroski_score" or r["_field"] == "fscore" or r["_field"] == "iv" or r["_field"] == "ma_50" or r["_field"] == "ma_200")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "ticker"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["ticker", "industry", "current_price", "market_cap", "pe_ratio", "rsi", "ma_50", "ma_200", "piotroski_score", "fscore", "iv"])
  |> sort(columns: ["ticker"])

title: Stock Analysis Dashboard
